chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-572 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.3500/2018 2. For hearing of main case 26-09-2023 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for the Petitioner.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition as according to him it has become infructuous. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
